results.title: Legislation will allow for planning on Irish unity - SF
results.description: Sinn Féin has said the objective of its legislation on Irish reunification is to allow the Government to prepare for a united Ireland.

results.title: OPEC+ to raise August oil output as crude prices continue to fall
results.description: NEW YORK CITY, New York: Seven members of the OPEC+ alliance have agreed to modestly increase oil production in August, extending a series of monthly output hikes as crude prices continue to fall from highs reached during the recent conflict involving Iran.
